change_notes: Corrected capitalization of particle in family_name: 'D'Aurevilly' to 'd'Aurevilly'
Extracted 'Bischof' from single_name to name_prefix; cleared single_name as name is now split into family_name and name_prefix
Apuleius of Madaura is a single ancient name; consolidated family_name 'Apulejus', given_names 'Apuleius', and erroneous name_particles 'von Madaura' into single_name 'Apuleius of Madaura'
Cleared family_name 'Beda' as the full name is already captured in single_name 'Beda Venerabilis'; this is a single historical name, not a split family/given name
Separated 'Frhr.' (title/honorific) from name_particles into name_prefix; retained 'von' as name_particles
Moved 'von' back into family_name as it is part of the compound surname 'Agrippa von Nettesheim', not a standalone connective particle; cleared name_particles

Sylvie Le Bon de Beauvoir is a compound surname; 'Le Bon de' are part of the family name, not a given name or particle. Consolidated full family name as 'Le Bon de Beauvoir', given_names set to 'Sylvie', name_particles cleared.
Corrected capitalization of 'Von' to 'von' in single_name
Corrected family name to 'Livi Bacci' (compound surname); 'Livi' was incorrectly placed in given_names
